headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Tesla, Apple, Meta And A 2013 Bitcoin Supporter Now Says 'Yes' To Shiba Inu
summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors’ favorite stocks over the last week — here’s a look at some of our top stories.

headline: Cathie Wood Hails Elon Musk's Visionary Impact: 'He's Transforming The World. Saving Humanity From Itself ... Is Extremely Important To Him''
summary: In a discussion at the global sports leader conference in Kiawah, S.C. this week, Cathie Wood, the CEO of ARK Invest, shared her perspectives on the future of technology and investment with Andy Serwer.

headline: This Penny Stock EV Leaves Big Boys Tesla, Rivian And Lucid In The Dust With 14% YTD Gain (CORRECTED)
summary: Tesla shares are down 31.1% year-to-date, while Rivian and Lucid have slumped 52% and 36.1% respectively.

headline: Tesla Alienates Bears And Bulls Alike, Nikola On The Mend, Canoo's Struggles And More: Biggest EV Stories Of The Week
summary: Tesla, a leading EV player, closed the week down over 6%, hit by weak Q1 deliveries and rumors of shelving low-cost vehicle plans.

headline: New Cybertruck Orders Will Only Be Delivered In 2025, Says Tesla Website
summary: Potential Tesla Cybertruck buyers will now have to wait till 2025 to take deliveries of their vehicles if they place an order today.

headline: Gene Munster Backs Tesla's Focus On Robotaxis Over Low-Cost EV, Gary Black Skeptical Of Strategy: 'Institutions Would Dump The Stock'
summary: Tesla CEO Elon Musk on Friday said that the company will unveil its self-driving robotaxi on August 8, following reports that the company has scrapped its plans to make a lower-cost EV priced at around $25,000.

headline: Tim Cook-Led Tech Giant Appeals To US Court For Overturning Import Ban On Its Apple Watches
summary: Apple is appealing to reverse a U.S. import ban on certain Apple Watches stemming from a patent dispute with Masimo Corporation, arguing the patented Masimo wearable was theoretical and challenging the patents' validity.

headline: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest Doubles Down On Tesla Despite 3.6% Plunge Amid Model 2 Rumors, Adds $22M Worth Of Shares
summary: Tesla continues to suffer due to adverse catalysts and Cathie Wood's Ark Invest, which is bullish on the company, used the weakness due to add to its position.

headline: Elon Musk Reacts As Tesla Celebrates 1B Miles Driven With FSD Software: 'Won't Be Long Before…10B Miles'
summary: EV giant Tesla Inc on Friday said that its cars have driven one billion miles with the help of its full self-driving (FSD) software, to much applause from company CEO Elon Musk.

headline: Meta Expands Labels For AI-Generated Content To Include Photos And Audio Across Facebook, Instagram And Threads
summary: Meta says it will add a "Made with AI" label itself, instead of forcing users to label AI-generated content or risk removal.

headline: Apple Unveiling AI Strategy At WWDC 2024 Will Be A 'Watershed Moment,' Says Wedbush's Dan Ives: Stock Could Go 'Massively Higher' To $250
summary: Analyst Dan Ives predicts that Apple's unveiling of its AI strategy at WWDC 2024 could be a transformative moment for the company, potentially driving its stock significantly higher.
